commit.message:
Music track rows: use translate3d + whole pixel for flicker-free Safari hover

Default state uses translate3d(0,0,0) to keep elements permanently on GPU
layer. Hover uses -1px (whole pixel) instead of -0.5px (sub-pixel) to
avoid Safari text re-rasterization. Removes Safari-only override.

commit.message:
Add Perplexity.Comet to app whitelist

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Milestone 5: Deadline Scheduling, IMMEDIATE Shutdown & Observer Interface (#7)

- Job.deadline + is_expired(): per-job deadline field; expired jobs are
  silently skipped by select_next_job() and counted in expired_count metric
- IMetricsObserver (metrics_observer.h): event interface fired on submit,
  execute, expire, and cancel; installed via set_observer() using
  std::atomic<shared_ptr> for zero-contention on worker hot path
- ShutdownMode enum + shutdown(IMMEDIATE): drains all client queues
  atomically before stopping workers; GRACEFUL remains default
- drain_all_clients(): snapshot-then-drain avoids holding registry_mutex_
  across drain_client() calls (deadlock prevention)
- record_execution() gains job_id param for observer correlation
- ClientMetrics.expired_count exposed via get_client_metrics()
- 10 new tests (49/49 passing): Shutdown, Deadline, Observer suites
- scaling_bench: throughput scaling (1–16 workers) + latency distribution
  via LatencyObserver; results in README.md
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/LOCKING_STRATEGY.md: component descriptions,
  data flow, lock hierarchy, observer re-entrancy constraint, contention
  analysis with future optimization notes

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
V42: unified plan — AME-2 cmd + 2209 bias/stall + curriculum

Command redesign:
- Actor: [d_xy, sin(d_yaw), cos(d_yaw)] instead of bearing-to-goal
- Critic: signed d_yaw (was absolute), full x_rel/y_rel
- Actor yaw randomized when d_xy > 2m (AME-2 trick)

Reward overhaul (6 main items):
- position_tracking=100, heading_tracking=50 (dominant signals)
- moving_to_goal=5, standing_at_goal=5 (AME-2 paper Eq.1-5)
- bias_goal=3.0 (NEW: 2209-style exploration, decays after 3000 iter)
- anti_stall=2.5 (NEW: 2209-style -1.0 penalty when vel<0.1)

Removed (caused standing-still local optimum):
- upward=0, goal_coarse=0, goal_fine=0, vel_toward_goal=0

Regularization strengthened:
- early_termination: -2→-500, joint_pos_limits: -1→-1000
- undesired_contacts: -0.02→-1, action_rate: -0.0005→-0.01

Curriculum system:
- Bootstrap episode=8s (was 20s), no fallen start
- Heading: 0→1 over 20% iters (was 60%)
- moving_to_goal v_min: 0.1→0.3 at 3000 iter
- Goal radius: 0.8→1.2→1.8→2.5→3.5→5.0 (level-based)
- bias_goal decay when success EMA>0.5 or after 3000 iter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 6-bit adder PLD for GAL22V10 with carry chain split

Carry chain split into 3x2-bit segments via pin feedback (C1, C3)
to stay within GAL22V10 product term limits. Includes exhaustive
tests covering all 8192 input combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add highlight and zoom effect on sidebar nav hover

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add dates and sort blog entries by date

Updated Contenidos section with publication dates in yyyymmdd format and reorganized entries in reverse chronological order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: dismiss onboarding quiz modal in E2E tests

The OnboardingQuizModal renders a full-screen overlay (z-85) for
unauthenticated users with no quiz_completed localStorage key.
In CI's fresh browser context, this blocks the Sign In button
and all other interactions. Set the key via addInitScript.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Pain-first filtering, deeper micro-personas, and ad-ready visceral quotes

- Filter out zero-pain posts in Build Legends mode (preprocessor)
- Send 8 docs x 800 chars with pain_score metadata to GPT for richer stories
- Redesign micro-personas: 5-field format (label, child_profile, trigger_scenario, parent_circumstance, ad_hook) with 4-6 per story
- Add visceral_quotes extraction for ad-ready copy-paste quotes
- Add pain sort toggle (Most Painful / Most Upvoted) to Source Posts table
- New DB migration for visceral_quotes column
- Backward-compatible with old persona format

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: serve telemetry only from cache, show helpful message when unavailable

FastF1 session loading requires too much RAM for 1GB hosting.
Telemetry API now only serves pre-cached data. Returns 503 with
instruction to use /speed bot command to load data first.

Frontend shows friendly message with instructions instead of error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- jwt.ts: generateToken, verifyToken (jsonwebtoken)
- JwtPayload型定義を追加
- テスト14件（正常系・異常系）

Don't render game during title/sector intro, add intro state

  switches to 'playing' only after countdown completes

  during the sector object preview screen

commit.message:
fix: ticket list not visible due to flex height overflow

The parent router-view has overflow-auto which prevented h-full from
constraining the Tickets page height. Changed to flex-1 min-h-0
overflow-hidden so the flex layout properly fills the viewport and
child list components can scroll internally.

commit.message:
fix(video-swap): tikwm TikTok import + local ffmpeg trim (#137)

* fix(video-swap): replace yt-dlp with tikwm API for TikTok import + add video trim retry

- Replace Modal /social-extract (yt-dlp) with tikwm.com free API for TikTok
  video import — fixes "Unexpected end of JSON input" error
- Download video + thumbnail from TikTok CDN, upload to R2 directly from backend
- Remove ModalClient dependency from video-swap router
- Add clear error for Instagram (manual upload required)
- Add retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff) to video_trim.py
  for transient R2 connectivity failures
- Clean up error messages in video trim job handler — users see
  actionable messages instead of raw Python tracebacks
- Add data-testid to queue spinner for test reliability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(video-swap): move video trim from Modal to local ffmpeg

Modal containers cannot reach Cloudflare R2 endpoints (persistent
ConnectError). Move video trimming to run locally on the API server:

- Add ffmpeg to API Dockerfile (alpine package, ~30MB)
- Add getFileBuffer() to AwsS3Service for direct R2 download
- Rewrite runVideoTrimJob to use local ffmpeg via child_process
  instead of calling Modal /video-trim endpoint
- Download source video from R2 via S3 client (no presigned URL)
- ffmpeg -c copy for fast trim, fallback to re-encode on keyframe issues
- Temp files cleaned up in finally block

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(k8s-sso-authentik): add English card set and refactor to i18n structure

- --en flag routes to scripts/linkedin-cards/en/
- linkedin-post-en.pdf for LinkedIn document post

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: fix release workflow — move secrets checks to job-level env vars

GitHub Actions does not support `secrets.*` context in `if:` expressions.
Move all `secrets.X != ''` checks to job-level `env:` as boolean env vars
(HAS_APPLE_CERT, HAS_APPLE_ID, HAS_WIN_CERT, HAS_GPG_KEY), then reference
`env.HAS_X` in step `if:` conditions.

Also add `if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')` guards on all jobs so
branch pushes never queue jobs and show spurious failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- ClassicDashboard에 onOpenEditor prop 추가
- 디자인 카드 호버 오버레이 '에디터로 이동' 버튼이 Step1 모달 오픈

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Integrate sentiment, commitments, and memories analysis into sync pipeline

- Add service-role auth path to detect-sentiment, extract-commitments,
  and extract-memories so process-sync-queue can invoke them
- Add batch thread mode to detect-sentiment (analyzes all unanalyzed
  messages in a thread via single call)
- Add fire-and-forget calls for all 3 analysis functions in
  triggerPostSyncAnalysis with dedup checks against existing data
- Fix error_log column names (message → error_message, stack_trace →
  error_stack) to match actual schema
- Resolve contact_id from participant_emails since threads table has
  no contact_id column

fix: reprepare reward ad after dismissal (#16)

Reward units never set intervals[], so the shared reprepare(adObject:)
guard was returning early and never reloading the ad. Move the interval
guard inside the interstitial/opening branches only, so reward ads
always reload after dismissal.
